commands.review_summary:
The PR adds persona-level TTS provider SecretRef collection for global and agent TTS config, registers two new secret target paths, extends agent-runtime SecretRef detection, adds focused collector tests, and edits `CHANGELOG.md`.

PR surface: Source +58, Tests +142, Docs +6. Total +206 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The current main source shows the collector walks top-level TTS providers but not persona provider overrides, and command-time resolution only analyzes targets selected by the command target ID set.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The code repair is narrow, but the external PR also needs contributor-supplied real runtime proof for their SecretRef setup, so this should stay in human review rather than a ClawSweeper repair lane.

target.title: fix(secrets): collect persona-level TTS provider SecretRefs
target.body:
## Summary

The secret collector walks `messages.tts.providers.*.apiKey` but does not walk `messages.tts.personas.*.providers.*.apiKey` or `agents.list[].tts.personas.*.providers.*.apiKey`. When a persona overrides the TTS provider config with a file-source SecretRef, the secret resolver never sees the ref, so the `apiKey` reaches the plugin as an unresolved object instead of the actual key string. The plugin then reports `not configured`.

This fix:
- Adds persona-level provider iteration in `collectTtsApiKeyAssignments`
- Registers two new target paths in the secret target registry (`messages.tts.personas.*.providers.*.apiKey` and `agents.list[].tts.personas.*.providers.*.apiKey`)
- Extends `hasAgentRuntimeSecretRefs` to detect persona-level TTS refs
- Adds 5 regression tests covering top-level, persona-level, combined, empty-persona, and agent-level persona paths

Closes #89607

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** File-source SecretRef in `messages.tts.personas.<id>.providers.elevenlabs.apiKey` is not resolved at runtime, causing `elevenlabs: not configured`.
- **Real environment tested:** macOS 15.5, Node v22.19.0, OpenClaw built from patched source at `/tmp/wt-89607`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

  ```bash
  cd /tmp/wt-89607
  pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
  pnpm build

  # Verify the persona-level collector is in the production bundle
  cat dist/runtime-config-collectors-tts-BgBmCuWf.js

  # Run the regression tests
  npx vitest run src/secrets/runtime-config-collectors-tts.test.ts --reporter=verbose
  ```

- **Evidence after fix:** terminal output from the patched build:

  The persona-level iteration is active in the production bundle:

  ```console
  $ cat dist/runtime-config-collectors-tts-BgBmCuWf.js
  ...
  const personas = params.tts.personas;
  if (isRecord(personas)) for (const [personaId, persona] of Object.entries(personas)) {
  if (!isRecord(persona)) continue;
  const personaProviders = persona.providers;
  if (!isRecord(personaProviders)) continue;
  for (const [providerId, providerConfig] of Object.entries(personaProviders)) {
  if (!isRecord(providerConfig)) continue;
  collectProviderApiKeyAssignment({
  providerId,
  providerConfig,
  pathPrefix: `${params.pathPrefix}.personas.${personaId}`,
  ...
  ```

  Terminal confirms all 5 new tests exercise the persona SecretRef collection:

  ```console
  $ npx vitest run src/secrets/runtime-config-collectors-tts.test.ts --reporter=verbose
  ✓ collectTtsApiKeyAssignments > collects SecretRefs from top-level TTS providers
  ✓ collectTtsApiKeyAssignments > collects SecretRefs from persona-level TTS provider overrides
  ✓ collectTtsApiKeyAssignments > collects SecretRefs from both top-level and persona-level providers
  ✓ collectTtsApiKeyAssignments > skips personas without providers
  ✓ collectTtsApiKeyAssignments > collects persona refs with agent-level path prefix
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
  Tests  5 passed (5)
  ```

- **Observed result after fix:** Production bundle at `dist/runtime-config-collectors-tts-BgBmCuWf.js` iterates persona-level providers and calls `collectProviderApiKeyAssignment` for each, ensuring file-source SecretRefs at `messages.tts.personas.*.providers.*.apiKey` are resolved before reaching the TTS plugin.
- **What was not tested:** Live gateway with an ElevenLabs account and file-source secret provider, triggering `openclaw infer tts convert` to confirm audio synthesis succeeds with the resolved key.
